title: Aoshima Shrine
summary: Aoshima Shrine (青島神社, Aoshima jinja) is a Shinto shrine located on Aoshima island, Miyazaki Prefecture, Japan. It is dedicated to Hikohohodemi no Mikoto and Toyotama-hime.
text: Aoshima Shrine (青島神社, Aoshima jinja) is a Shinto shrine located on Aoshima island, Miyazaki Prefecture, Japan. It is dedicated to Hikohohodemi no Mikoto and Toyotama-hime.
